definitions: The quality of being uninteresting or boring.
A state of being slow to understand; mental slowness.
Lack of vividness or intensity (of color, sound, etc.).
examples: The dullness of the lecture made it hard to stay awake.
She noticed the dullness of the knife blade.
A certain dullness in his eyes suggested fatigue.
The dullness of the paint job was disappointing.
